mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO devint.book__c( name, type__c, cover__c, description__c, author__c ) VALUES
( #{book.name}, #{book.typeC}, #{book.coverC}, #{book.descriptionC}, #{book.authorC} )

INSERT INTO devext.bookbyvolume( book, cover, isbn13, price, ispurchased, name, type, volume, noneedtobuy, description, link, pubdate, author ) VALUES
( #{book.book}, #{book.cover}, #{book.isbn13}, #{book.price}, #{book.ispurchased}, #{book.name}, #{book.type}, #{book.volume}, #{book.noneedtobuy}, #{book.description}, #{book.link}, #{book.pubdate}, #{book.author} )

update.foreach: UPDATE devext.bookbyvolume SET book = #{book.book}, cover = #{book.cover}, isbn13 = #{book.isbn13}, price = #{book.price}, ispurchased = #{book.ispurchased}, name = #{book.name}, type = #{book.type}, volume = #{book.volume}, noneedtobuy = #{book.noneedtobuy}, description = #{book.description}, link = #{book.link}, pubdate = #{book.pubdate}, author = #{book.author} WHERE id = #{book.id}

mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO devext.branchbook( book, volume, name, branch, bookLink, minPrice ) VALUES
( #{book.book}, #{book.volume}, #{book.name}, #{book.branch}, #{book.bookLink}, #{book.minPrice} )
